name: Necrozma
description: An ancient creature that resembles black prism glass. It is said to have come from another world in search of light to fuel its hollow matrix.
originLore: Necrozma arrived as black prism glass starving for light. It drains radiance from entire worlds to refill a hollow matrix that once shone as the blaze that lit Ultra Space.

lore.celestialConcordance: Where Necrozma feeds, suns dim. Where it is sated, prism light fractures into living weapons.

quantumResonators.name: Photon Geyser
quantumResonators.description: Erupts stored light as a vertical annihilation column.

quantumResonators.name: Prism Armor
quantumResonators.description: Diffuses incoming force across crystal facets.
